title: Disney Minnie Mouse 8pc Diary with Lock Stationery Set Girls Ages 3 and Up
description:

Disney Minnie Mouse 8pc Diary with Lock Stationery Set Girls Ages 3 and Up

This Disney Junior Minnie Mouse diary journal stationery set in signature Minnie Mouse pink is perfect for keeping little ones' daily journals, drawings, thoughts, and doodles safe and secure under lock and key! Along with the 60-sheet diary with lock and two keys, this Minnie Mouse diary also comes with some fun art supplies including a pen, stamper, ink pad, and two sticker sheets of Minnie and her lovable kitty, Figaro. The Disney Minnie Mouse diary for girls is lightweight and great for travel! One of the best parts about the hardcover diary is that little ones can immediately document family memories while on the go, helping to boost writing and communication skills. Traveling to a Disney Park in the future? Your little one can easily take this lightweight travel journal with them to collect autographs and signatures from all your Disney characters like Donald Duck, Daisy Duck, Goofy, Pluto, and the rest of the gang from Mickey Mouse Clubhouse on your next Disneyland or Disneyworld adventure, making it a keepsake they’ll treasure for years to come!

Key Features

  • MINNIE MOUSE STATIONERY SET: This pink Disney Minnie Mouse stationery set with a locking diary is perfect for keeping any little Minnie Mouse fan's memories, daily entries, drawings, and doodles safe and secure under lock and key! The set also comes with other fun art supplies including a pen, stamps, an ink pad, and stickers!
  • DIARY WITH LOCK: Your budding artist or writer can rest assured no brother or sister sibling will catch a glimpse of their drawings, notes, or doodles, as this Minnie Mouse diary comes with an easy-to-use lock and two silver keys to keep all their thoughts safe and secure!
  • TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Little Minnie Mouse fans can easily take this lightweight travel journal diary with them to record all their bow-tastic adventures! Be sure to bring this composition notebook to collect autographs and signatures from all their favorite Disney characters on your next Disneyland or Disneyworld family trip!
  • FUN ART SUPPLIES: This Disney Minnie Mouse diary also comes with other fun art supplies including a pen, stamps, an ink pad, and stickers! In addition to writing and journaling, the Minnie Mouse diary is a fun place for little ones to pass the time practicing drawing, doodling, and making art
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 9.25” x 2” x 9”; Weight: .62lbs; Color: Pink; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UPDDSLDLSELK
  • UPC: 191537412876
  • Color: Minnie Mouse
  • Size: 8pc

A great educational learning tool to encourage toddlers and kids to write, doodle, draw and be creative, but with privacy, if they are not quite ready to share their ideas with the world. This Disney Minnie Mouse locking notebook is an ideal gift for any little Minnie Mouse fan to pass the time and practice drawing, writing down their thoughts or a favorite song, journaling, and more; the diary with lock and keys makes a fun stocking stuffer, Christmas gift, birthday present or party favor!
